stemHtml: Due to apparent wander what happens to a vertical gyroscope when operating near the poles and near the equator?

options.a: Near the poles: drift; Near the equator: no effect.
options.b: Near the poles: no effect; Near the equator: topple.
options.c: Near the poles: topple; Near the equator: drift.
options.d: Near the poles: topple; Near the equator: no effect.
